title: stelis bialata
intro: Stelis bialata, also known as the "Bialata Orchid", is a type of orchid plant native to Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Stelis bialata include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe sore throats and reduce the severity of colds and flu. Stelis bialata can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
